user.title: Connect to a Codex Monitor Agent
user.description: Enter the URL of the agent running on the Codex computer.

data_description.token: The token passed to the agent with --token.
data_description.name: Defaults to the computer hostname reported by the agent.

reconfigure.title: Reconnect Codex Monitor
reconfigure.description: Change the URL while keeping the existing device and entity IDs.

reauth_confirm.title: Update Codex Monitor authentication
reauth_confirm.description: The configured API token was rejected. Enter the current agent token.

zeroconf_confirm.title: Connect to discovered Codex Monitor
zeroconf_confirm.description: Agent discovered at {url}. Enter its API token to finish setup.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the agent.
error.invalid_auth: The agent rejected the API token.
error.invalid_response: The server did not return a supported Codex Monitor response.
error.invalid_url: Enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL without a query or fragment.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.unique_id_mismatch: The new URL belongs to a different agent installation.
abort.invalid_discovery: The discovery record did not contain a valid installation identity.
abort.discovery_changed: The discovered agent identity changed during setup.

init.title: Codex Monitor options
init.description: Choose the fallback reconciliation interval. Live changes use the event stream.

incompatible_agent.title: Codex Monitor agent is incompatible
incompatible_agent.description: Home Assistant could not understand the agent response: {error}. Update the agent and reload the integration.

device_not_loaded.message: The selected Codex Monitor device is not loaded.

approve_request.name: Approve request
approve_request.description: Approve one exact pending Codex request.

request_id.name: Request ID
request_id.description: Pending request identifier from the task event.

for_session.name: Approve for session
for_session.description: Also approve matching requests for this app-server session when supported.

reject_request.name: Reject request
reject_request.description: Reject one exact pending Codex request.

cancel_turn.name: Cancel turn
cancel_turn.description: Interrupt the turn after rejecting the request.

submit_input.name: Submit input
submit_input.description: Answer one exact Codex user-input request.

text.name: Text
text.description: Text answer for a single-question request.

answers.name: Structured answers
answers.description: Question IDs mapped to answer arrays.

interrupt_turn.name: Interrupt turn
interrupt_turn.description: Interrupt one exact running Codex turn.
